selected.source_title: Leopard Enters Liquor Shop in Rajasthan's Tonk, Attacks Man; Video Goes Viral
selected.source_summary: A leopard entered a liquor shop in Rajasthan's Tonk district, attacked three people and was later locked inside the shop by a quick-thinking salesman before being rescued. The dramatic incident triggered panic among locals and drew a large crowd.
